items.title: Yep.
items.author: Evan Barnes
items.body_excerpt:
Yep. 

The sad thing about ESPN is it's part of a bigger problem. And you can tell who's aware of that by how they discuss these layoffs. Only in Micro terms or macro as part of widespread media layoffs. Whole game is changing and it's bigger than 1 entity.
